title: Nin Ninja RESCUE MISSION
description:
STORYYou are now a ninja and have been given an important mission: rescue one of your master's projects that has been captured by a dangerous villain.

Run through dangerous environments without stopping and overcome every obstacle that stands in your way. Your training in the mountains has taught you powerful new abilities that will help you survive this journey.

Slow down time to avoid deadly traps, activate your Energy Shield to protect yourself from danger, and use your ninja skills to react quickly in every situation. Precision, speed, and perfect timing are the keys to completing your mission.

Travel across challenging stages filled with spikes, moving platforms, hidden dangers, and relentless enemies. As your adventure progresses, the challenges become increasingly difficult, testing your reflexes and determination.

Every level brings new obstacles, requiring quick decisions and skillful movement. Stay focused, master your abilities, and never stop moving.

FEATURES• Fast-paced 2D action platformer

• Use Time Slow to escape deadly traps

• Activate your Energy Shield to survive dangerous situations

• Dodge spikes, enemies and deadly obstacles

• 16 handcrafted levels

• Challenge your reflexes with increasingly difficult stages

• Retro-inspired pixel art

 

Dangerous enemies.

Your master is counting on you.

This is your mission.
description_short: Nin Ninja Rescue Mission is an action, adventure, platform, and endless runner game. Run, face dangerous enemies, dodge traps, defeat enemies, and use your skills to complete a rescue mission.
